name: slowbeardigger/xmr-pay
description: Non-custodial Monero payment verification in pure PHP — view-key only, no monero-wallet-rpc, no server. The PHP engine behind xmr-pay, mirroring the npm library.

scripts.test: for t in autoload state util aggregation refund crypto stress invariant-stress; do echo "-- $t --"; php tests/$t.test.php || exit 1; done
